description: ngrok is a cloud networking platform for exposing, securing, and routing traffic to applications and services running locally or elsewhere. Its agent creates public endpoints and tunnels, while the cloud service provides account and infrastructure management APIs.
summary: ngrok exposes a cloud REST API at https://api.ngrok.com, a local unauthenticated Agent API at http://127.0.0.1:4040/api, and the ngrok CLI; the cloud API uses ngrok API keys, while the CLI is configured with either an agent authtoken for tunnel operation or an API key for `ngrok api` commands.
